environment.repositoryStatus: Tracked implementation state was clean at the base commit; pre-existing untracked harness trace artifacts under .ide were untouched. The final implementation commit contains exactly two authorized source files.

task.userRequest: Implement exactly one continuation behavior: CertificateProfileId rejects a non-null identifier that does not match the complete ADR 0001 v1 grammar ^x509-profile-v1-sha256-[0-9a-f]{64}$ without trimming, using one representative JavaSpec RED example and preserving the valid-value behavior. Trace to REQ-X509-PROFILE-INTEGRITY-014, do not repeat describe, keep Java 21, and modify only necessary domain production/specification files.
requirements: ADR 0001 CertificateProfile v1 whole-string identifier grammar

admission.reason: Complete sealed spec-driven RAW_EVENT_STREAM proves one authorized JavaSpec continuation behavior with successful pre-baseline executable fingerprint, no repeated describe, green baseline, meaningful expectation RED before production, bounded GREEN, selected/full 2/2 verification, zero pending work, Java 21 Maven success, exact two-file commit scope, and matching hashes.

termination.summary: CertificateProfileId rejects a non-null leading-whitespace identifier through the exact whole-input ADR 0001 v1 grammar; all captured and independent verification gates pass.
